microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing inspection workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model serving cross-org engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation standard adopted across sovereign-cloud environments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating safely across security, compliance, and engineering stakeholders.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, enabling the team to safely execute more validation cycles per quarter.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** in routine development tasks.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, translating qualitative findings into prioritized backlog items with clear acceptance criteria.

Improved data integrity and retrieval speed by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and reducing friction for engineers navigating large internal knowledge bases.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating consistently across 140+ engineering and operations teams toward shared delivery milestones.

Developed a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting structured discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a phased roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Enabled leadership to safely target automation gaps and prioritize high-value investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked and visualized operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, improving transparency and accelerating data-driven planning decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and maintaining meticulous parts and system inventory to keep every workstation fully operational throughout.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-severity tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and ensure engineering teams could execute scheduled maintenance and deployment tasks without disruption or backlog drift.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment cycles by 25%** and enabling faster, safer rollouts of system updates across the robotics fleet with reduced manual intervention.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a structured CRM process that improved scheduling accuracy, follow-up consistency, and on-time project execution.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the company website, refining the Google Business profile, and aligning outreach messaging to target customer profiles in local service areas.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks tied to underpriced labor and materials and recommending corrective rate adjustments that strengthened per-job profitability going forward.

tailoring_notes: Wove in 'preventive maintenance schedule' (JD term) as a conceptual anchor in amazon_robotics bullet#1 — framing the OS migration dependency mapping as maintaining system readiness in the same way a PM technician tracks parts and keeps equipment operational.

Used 'parts and system inventory' (mirrors JD's 'keeps track and inventory of parts, supplies, or equipment') directly in amazon_robotics bullet#1 to signal direct vocabulary alignment with the Preventive Maintenance Technician responsibilities.

Incorporated 'safely' and 'safety' framing (JD requirement: 'perform all job duties in a safe manner') across amazon_robotics bullet#3 and microsoft_ft bullet#4 to reflect the JD's strong emphasis on safe work practices and hazard awareness.

Framed microsoft_2022 bullet#1 around 'coordinating consistently across teams toward shared delivery milestones' to mirror JD language around teamwork, lateral collaboration across departments, and seamless guest/operational flow.

Used 'work-order tracking' and 'scheduling accuracy' in pro_painters bullet#1 to echo the JD's 'Repair or create Work Ticket' and 'Preventive Maintenance schedule' language, grounding a sales-ops bullet in maintenance-operations vocabulary.
